# Code of Conduct

## Our commitment

We are committed to a welcoming and harassment-free community for everyone.

## Expected behavior

Be respectful.
Accept constructive feedback.
Assume good intent.
Focus on the issue, not the person.

## Unacceptable behavior

Harassment, abuse, personal attacks, discrimination, and doxxing are not tolerated.

## Enforcement

Project maintainers are responsible for clarifying and enforcing this policy.

## Reporting

Report incidents to: sohrab.behdani@proton.me

All reports will be reviewed and handled with care.

## Attribution

This policy is adapted from the Contributor Covenant, version 2.1:
https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/
